---
name: Development Task
description: Template for development tasks
title: '[TASK] '
labels: task
assignees: ''

---

## Task Description
Clear description of what needs to be done.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Module
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] ML/AI
- [ ] Infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation

## Owner
@username - Single person responsible

## Estimated Effort
Story points or time estimate.

## Deadline
YYYY-MM-DD

## Dependencies
- Blocked by: #issue-number
- Blocks: #issue-number

## Related PRs
- PR #

## Notes
Additional notes or resources.
